metadata.thoughts:
**Clarifying strike details**

The content mentions a 24-hour strike without precise start and end times. It seems to run from 00:00 to 23:59, on Friday, October 20, 2023. Although service is regular until 8:30 and again from 17:00 to 20:00, there’s partial service during the strike. So, I think the timeframe is 2023-10-20 00:00:00 to 2023-10-20 23:59:59, aligning with the local time for a full 24 hours.
